summary: Casino slot machine style vertical scrolling text reveal component for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/title-slot-reel/src/TitleSlotReel.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `TitleSlotReel` and `titleSlotReelDefaultProps`, then register the `TitleSlotReel` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Title Slot Reel Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/title-slot-reel to my project. Preserve the exported TitleSlotReelProps API and register the TitleSlotReel composition with the default props.
